summary: Fixed critical backend bug in midwife client detail API. Navigation from client list to client-detail page now works correctly.

fixed.issue: Field name mismatch - query used 'provider_id' but document has 'pro_user_id'
fixed.fix_applied: Changed query from {'provider_id': user.user_id} to {'pro_user_id': user.user_id}

fixed.issue: Same field name mismatch as GET endpoint
fixed.fix_applied: Changed query to use 'pro_user_id' instead of 'provider_id'

frontend_issues.notes: Frontend navigation code was correct. Issue was in backend API returning 404 due to field mismatch.

critical_code_review_comments: ROOT CAUSE: The clients collection uses field names 'pro_user_id' and 'pro_type' instead of 'provider_id' and 'provider_type' as the API endpoints were expecting
VERIFIED: After fix, GET /api/midwife/clients/{client_id} returns correct client data with visits, birth_summary, notes
VERIFIED: Navigation from clients.tsx → client-detail.tsx works correctly with URL query params: clientId and clientName
VERIFIED: Client detail page loads and displays prenatal visits with summary (BP, FHR, FH, Wt)
The client_detail.tsx UI correctly uses router.push with query params and useLocalSearchParams to receive clientId/clientName
seed_data_creation: Existing test client: client_418b912073a5 (Jane Test Mom) with prenatal visit from Jan 15, 2025
context_for_next_testing_agent: The midwife client detail navigation bug has been fixed. The issue was a field name mismatch in server.py between 'provider_id' (used in queries) and 'pro_user_id' (actual field in MongoDB documents). Test the complete flow: Login as midwife → Clients tab → Click client card → Client detail page loads with prenatal visits.

rca_of_the_issue.symptom: Clicking on a client card in the clients list navigated to /client-detail but showed 'Client not found' error
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Backend API endpoint GET /api/midwife/clients/{client_id} was querying MongoDB with {'provider_id': user.user_id} but the actual documents have 'pro_user_id' field
evidence: List endpoint (/api/midwife/clients) returned clients successfully showing 'pro_user_id' field
Single client endpoint (/api/midwife/clients/{client_id}) returned 404 'Client not found'
MongoDB documents contain: client_id, pro_user_id, pro_type, name, email, etc.
Query was using wrong field name: provider_id instead of pro_user_id
rca_of_the_issue.fix: Changed server.py lines 5638 and 5669 from 'provider_id' to 'pro_user_id'
rca_of_the_issue.verification: After fix, GET /api/midwife/clients/client_418b912073a5 returns full client data including visits array

flows_verified: ✓ Navigation to Clients tab from dashboard
✓ Client list shows 'Jane Test Mom' with status 'Prenatal', EDD, Home Birth
✓ Client detail page loads showing email, Prenatal Visits section
✓ Existing prenatal visit displayed with summary (BP 120/70, FHR 140, FH 28.0 cm, Wt 145.0 lbs)
✓ Add button (+) visible for adding new prenatal visits
